comment.body:
yeah i will https://www.cmegroup.com/markets/equities/sp/e-mini-sandp500.quotes.html
so March expiry is 3rd friday.  H is CME month code for March, hence ES H 2025.  M is June, U is Sept Z is Dec.  As we come ~8 trading sessions or so up to expiry the volume for the following contract starts ramping up.  Last friday was about 60% in favour of H con.  Monday (Yesterday) around 50/50
